title: Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|reb|new|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series from [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]]|''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters]]'', the [[canon]] comic-book series from [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]]|linebreak=1}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:TheBountyHunters-TPB.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters'' |writer=*[[Timothy Truman]] (1) *[[Randy Stradley]] (2) *[[Mark Schultz]] (3) |penciller=*[[Timothy Truman]] (1) *[[Javier Saltares]] (2) *[[Mel Rubi]] (3) |inker=*[[Timothy Truman]] (1) *[[Christopher Ivy]] (2) *[[Andrew Pepoy]] (3) |letterer=*[[Michael Taylor]] (1) *[[Amador Cisneros]] (2) *[[Clem Robins]] (3) |colorist=*[[David McCaig|Dave McCaig]] (1) *[[Digital Broome]] (2) *[[Dan Jackson]] (3) |cover artist=*[[Timothy Truman]] (1) *[[Douglas Wheatley|Doug Wheatley]] (2) *[[David McCaig|Dave McCaig]] (2) *[[Marc Gabbana]] (3) |editor=*[[Peet Janes]] (1-2) *[[Philip D. Amara]] (3) |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[August 11]], [[1999]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/99-008/Star-Wars-The-Bounty-Hunters---Aurra-Sing|text=Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters - Aurra Sing}} |end date=[[October 13]], 1999{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/99-095/Star-Wars-The-Bounty-Hunters---Kenix-Kil|text=Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters - Kenix Kil}} |schedule=Monthly |format=Completed |issues=3 |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters''''' was a three-issue [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. The first issue was released in August of [[1999]]. The comic ''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' was also included in the TPB. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" width="33%" align="center"|Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" width="33%" align="center"|Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" width="33%" align="center"|Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
